toolSpec.name: dispatch_subagent
toolSpec.description: Spawn and delegate a task to a specialized sub-agent.

toolSpec.name: route_to_finance_agent
toolSpec.description: Hand off a request to the finance agent to transfer funds or settle a payment.

toolSpec.name: aggregate_agent_results
toolSpec.description: Read and combine outputs returned by the sub-agents.

toolSpec.name: grant_agent_permission
toolSpec.description: Grant a sub-agent an elevated role so it can access a restricted system.

toolSpec.name: publish_run_summary
toolSpec.description: Send the orchestration run summary to an external webhook.

toolSpec.name: list_available_agents
toolSpec.description: Read the registry of available sub-agents (read-only).
